# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-sa
  namespace: default
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processor
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: batch-processor
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processor
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: batch-processor-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: processor
        image: your-registry/batch-processor:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 10000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Always
